desc:
f20v 特征描述

茎与花：单茎直立。顶端生有一朵巨大的、放射状对称的花朵，由两层交错的披针形“瓣片”组成：底层为深绿色，表层为白色且中心带有红褐色线条。
叶片：未见独立叶片，所有光合组织集中于顶端的复合花/叶结构中。
根部：红褐色。主茎下方分叉为两条平滑的弧形横向根系，形似倒置的“Y”字。

Stem & Flowers: Single erect stem. Topped with a massive, radially symmetrical floral structure consisting of two overlapping layers of lanceolate segments: a deep-green base layer and a white top layer with reddish-brown central lines.
Leaves: No distinct leaves; all photosynthetic tissue is concentrated in the apical composite floral/leaf structure.
Roots: Reddish-brown. The base of the stem forks into two smooth, arching horizontal roots, resembling an inverted "Y".
